# Synastral

Synastral (https://synastral.com/) is an astrology website centered on a
free birth chart generator. Enter a name, date, time, and place of birth
and the site renders a full natal wheel — houses, aspects, and placements
— directly on the page. No account, no email, and no catch: the chart is
generated instantly and belongs to the visitor.

## Kate

Synastral is run by Kate, an astrologer who has been reading charts for
over a decade (practicing since 2014), first informally for friends and
now for clients on four continents. She reads using the Placidus house
system. Her practice blends traditional technique with a clean, printed
presentation style.

## Full readings

To go beyond the free chart generator and book a full reading with Kate,
visit https://ko-fi.com/synastral.

## Chart prints

Museum-grade prints of natal charts, plus related zines and small studio
objects, are sold through Kate's Etsy shop at https://etsy.com/shop/synastral.

## Contact

kate@synastral.com
